jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Haldiram's
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
